scripts.build:shared: yarn -s workspace @happier-dev/protocol build && yarn -s workspace @happier-dev/cli-common build
scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true, maxRetries: 20, retryDelay: 50 });" && node ../../scripts/workspaces/runTypeScriptCli.mjs -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/writeDistBinWrappers.mjs
scripts.build:binary: yarn -s build:shared && yarn -s build && node scripts/buildBinary.mjs
